brand.title: Historical Exchange Index
brand.tagline: A quiet registry of crypto exchanges, active and gone.
footer.registryTagline: Historical Exchange Index — quiet registry / archive-first / history-first
page.home.title: Historical Exchange Index
page.home.description: Search and browse a historical registry of active, limited, inactive, dead, merged, acquired, and rebranded crypto exchanges.
page.home.heading: Historical Exchange Index
page.home.intro: A quiet registry of crypto exchanges, active and gone. Search the registry, browse dead-side history, or inspect the active-side field.
page.dead.title: Dead exchanges
page.dead.description: Browse dead-side crypto exchange records, including dead, merged, acquired, and rebranded exchanges with archive-aware handling.
page.dead.heading: Dead-side registry
page.dead.intro: Closed, absorbed, rebranded, or otherwise gone exchanges. This view emphasizes death reason, archive access, and dense graveyard browsing.
page.active.title: Active exchanges
page.active.description: Browse active-side crypto exchange records, including active, limited, and inactive exchanges with current URL-state context.
page.active.heading: Active-side registry
page.active.intro: Currently active, limited, or not yet safely classified as dead. This view emphasizes current state, URL handling, and entity-level history.
page.about.title: About
page.about.description: About Historical Exchange Index, a historical registry of crypto exchanges covering active, dead, merged, acquired, and rebranded exchange records.
page.about.heading: Why Historical Exchange Index exists
page.about.intro: HEI keeps exchange identity, status shifts, major lifecycle events, archived URLs, and supporting evidence in one historical registry.
page.methodology.title: Methodology
page.methodology.description: How HEI defines, classifies, verifies, and revises historical crypto exchange records.
page.methodology.heading: How HEI classifies and verifies records
page.methodology.intro: Definitions, status rules, death-reason handling, evidence standards, URL safety, uncertainty, and correction procedures for the registry.
page.stats.title: Stats
page.stats.description: Registry-level statistics covering HEI scale, composition, historical distributions, evidence depth, and data coverage.
page.stats.heading: Stats
page.stats.intro: A measured view of registry scale, active-side and dead-side composition, timelines, evidence depth, and coverage quality.
page.quality.title: Quality
page.quality.description: HEI quality and coverage signals for evidence, archives, dates, origins, URLs, confidence, and verification freshness.
page.quality.heading: Quality and coverage
page.quality.intro: Inspect where the registry is strong, where evidence or archives are thin, and which reviewed records need further strengthening.
page.explore.title: Explorer
page.explore.description: Explore reviewed HEI entities and events with structured filters, stable query state, and dossier handoffs.
page.explore.heading: Explorer
page.explore.intro: Filter reviewed entities and events without changing canonical identity, enum values, or shareable query keys across locales.
page.updates.title: Updates
page.updates.description: Reviewed HEI registry updates covering canonical additions and evidence-backed record changes.
page.updates.heading: Registry updates
page.updates.intro: Track reviewed additions and record changes after they enter canonical public state. Raw monitoring signals and unreviewed candidates remain internal.
page.incidents.title: Incidents
page.incidents.description: Reviewed exchange incident records across hacks, exploits, suspensions, insolvency, shutdowns, regulation, and related lifecycle events.
page.incidents.heading: Exchange incidents
page.incidents.intro: Browse reviewed exchange incidents and lifecycle disruptions linked back to entity dossiers and supporting evidence.
page.monthly.title: Monthly
page.monthly.description: Monthly HEI snapshots summarizing reviewed exchange closures, incidents, updates, and registry change.
page.monthly.heading: Monthly exchange history snapshot
page.monthly.intro: A reviewed monthly view of exchange closures, incidents, record additions, and evidence-backed registry change.
page.exchange.title: Exchange record
page.exchange.description: Historical exchange dossier with identity, lifecycle status, URLs, events, and supporting evidence.
page.exchange.heading: Exchange record
page.exchange.intro: A reviewed entity dossier combining canonical identity, lifecycle facts, archive-aware URL handling, events, and supporting evidence.
